3279470.name: EZ2ON REBOOT : R - AZURE EXPRESSION
3279470.description:
R U READY 2 GO INSIDA DJ BOX AGAIN?

Experience the timeless passion of blue light in 「AZURE EXPRESSION」

The contents of this DLC are based on the Legacy series, which was released in the early 2010s.

The DLC includes exclusive music, exclusive theme skins, exclusive panel skins, and exclusive note skins.
